ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Africa, Asia) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country (e.g., Algeria, Angola) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used in the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., Futures Trading, Margin Trading) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of the service (e.g., trading, banking) */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the service was launched */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the service (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_services" (
  "country_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-service combination */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the service in the country (e.g., yes, restricted, none) */,
  "exceptions" TEXT /* Exceptions for the service in the country */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the service became available in the country */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the service will or has become unavailable */,
  "restriction_details" TEXT /* Detailed information on restrictions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_services_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_services_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, viewer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data content of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_exceptions" (
  "exception_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exception */,
  "country_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country-service combination */,
  "exception_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the exception */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exception_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_exceptions_country_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_service_id") REFERENCES country_services ("country_service_id")
)
